final:
module voltage_regulator (
    input [7:0] obf_Vin,  // 8-bit input voltage
    output reg [7:0] Vout // 8-bit output voltage
);

always @(*) begin
    if (obf_Vin >= 8'd5) 
        Vout = 8'd5; // Output 5V if obf_Vin is greater than or equal to 5V
    else 
        Vout = obf_Vin; // Otherwise, output obf_Vin
end

endmodule
